results.title: Top Agentic AI Trends to Watch in 2026 - CloudKeeper
results.content: [Skip to main content](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation#main-content). *   [CloudKeeper LensGPT](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/cloudkeeper-lensgpt)Agentic AI FinOps Platform. [](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation). *   [Introduction](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation#toc-introduction). *   [What Is Agentic AI](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation#toc-what-is-agentic-ai). *   [Why 2026 Marks a Structural Shift](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation#toc-why-2026-marks-a-structural-shift). *   [Top Agentic AI Trends to Watch in 2026](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation#toc-top-agentic-ai-trends-to-watch-in-2026). Generative AI](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation#toc-agentic-ai-vs-generative-ai). *   [Preparing Enterprises for Agentic AI at Scale](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation#toc-preparing-enterprises-for-agentic-ai-at-scale). *   [Agentic AI in Action: Cloud Cost Optimization with CloudKeeper](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation#toc-agentic-ai-in-action-cloud-cost-optimization-with-cloudkeeper). _(Recommended reading:_[_Everything You Need to Know About Agentic AI_](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/everything-you-need-know-about-agentic-ai)_)_. These AI agents manage functions such as [cloud cost optimization](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/), security incident response, and financial monitoring without waiting for human prompts. Enterprises operating across [multi-cloud](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/glossary/multi-cloud-cost-management) and hybrid setups rely on Agentic AI to coordinate AI agents responsible for cost, performance, security, and compliance simultaneously. Agentic AI systems gain significant effectiveness when connected to [real-time observability across cloud, IT and financial environments](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/cloudkeeper-lens). [LensGPT uses AI agents to analyze cloud usage data, surface cost drivers, and provide contextual insights](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/cloudkeeper-lensgpt) and recommendations aligned with governance policies. [Connect with us](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation). [Read More](https://www.cloudkeeper.com/insights/blog/top-agentic-ai-trends-watch-2026-how-ai-agents-are-redefining-enterprise-automation#). [![Image 29: Georgia Southern University Uses Druid AI Agents to Revolutionize Student Engagement and Operations](https://www.druidai.com/hubfs/druid-ai-georgia-ai-agents.jpg) CASE STUDY Georgia Southern University Uses Druid AI Agents to Revolutionize Student Engagement and Operations](https://www.druidai.com/case-studies/georgia-southern-university-education-automate-student-engagement-ai-agent)[CASE STUDY HR European Bank Transforms HR Operations, Reducing Admin Tasks by 30% with Druid AI](https://www.druidai.com/case-studies/banca-transilvania-uses-druid-ai-agents-hr-automation)[CASE STUDY RETAIL Leading European Retail Chain - Auchan - Improves Sla Response Time by 40% With Druid AI Agents](https://www.druidai.com/case-studies/auchan-retail-operational-support-ai-agent). Modern [voice AI](https://www.druidai.com/ai-voice-agents) now supports truly bidirectional conversations, enabling more natural dialogue, improved handling of accents and languages, and multilingual interactions - including real-time translation. [![Image 59: customer experience in insurance and the role of AI](https://www.druidai.com/hs-fs/hubfs/customer-experience-in-insurance%20%281%29.jpg?width=740&height=416&name=customer-experience-in-insurance%20%281%29.jpg) Insurance MARCH 29, 2026 ###### Customer Experience in Insurance: Why AI Is Essential for Better CX](https://www.druidai.com/blog/customer-experience-in-insurance-why-ai-is-essential-for-better-cx)[![Image 60: Agentic AI in Banking](https://www.druidai.com/hs-fs/hubfs/conversational-ai-voice-interaction.jpg?width=740&height=416&name=conversational-ai-voice-interaction.jpg) Banking FEBRUARY 27, 2026 ###### 7 Use Cases For Agentic AI in Banking](https://www.druidai.com/blog/7-use-cases-for-agentic-ai-in-banking)[![Image 61: Automated Insurance Claims How AI Is Transforming Claims Processing](https://www.druidai.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Automated%20Insurance%20Claims%20How%20AI%20Is%20Transforming%20Claims%20Processing%20%282%29.webp?width=740&height=416&name=Automated%20Insurance%20Claims%20How%20AI%20Is%20Transforming%20Claims%20Processing%20%282%29.webp) Insurance JANUARY 28, 2026 ###### Automated Insurance Claims: How AI Is Transforming Claims Processing](https://www.druidai.com/blog/automated-insurance-claims).

results.content: [![Image 6](https://joget.com/wp-content/themes/jogetter/img/feather-search.svg)](https://joget.com/ai-agent-adoption-in-2026-what-the-analysts-data-shows/#). *   [AI Agent Builder](https://joget.com/joget-ai-agent-builder/). [![Image 7](https://joget.com/wp-content/themes/jogetter/img/icons/search.png)](https://joget.com/ai-agent-adoption-in-2026-what-the-analysts-data-shows/#)[Start Free Trial ![Image 8](https://joget.com/wp-content/themes/jogetter/img/icons/redirect%20icon.png)](https://www.joget.org/get-started/). ![Image 9: AI Agent Adoption in 2026: What the Data Shows](https://joget.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/4.png). # [AI agents](https://joget.com/agentic-ai-the-next-big-thing-in-ai/) are moving out of the lab and into business operations. ![Image 11](https://joget.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Multi-AI-Agents-1920x1047.png). Both Gartner and [**Forrester**](https://www.forrester.com/blogs/predictions-2026-ai-moves-from-hype-to-hard-hat-work/)**emphasize that employees need training in how to design agent workflows**, supervise their operation, and collaborate effectively with automated systems. Visual, no-code platforms like Joget, with its [Joget AI Agent Builder](https://joget.com/joget-ai-agent-builder/), are changing who can build autonomous systems. *   [Share on X (Opens in new window)X](https://joget.com/ai-agent-adoption-in-2026-what-the-analysts-data-shows/?share=twitter&nb=1). *   [Share on Facebook (Opens in new window)Facebook](https://joget.com/ai-agent-adoption-in-2026-what-the-analysts-data-shows/?share=facebook&nb=1).
